251.iwh_en: It was reported from Ikrimah that he said regarding the mustahadah (a woman with dysfunctional bleeding) and the woman whose menstruation is irregular — menstruating once a month or twice a month: 'Her waiting period ('iddah) is three months.'
251.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ikrimah bahwa ia berkata mengenai mustahadah (wanita dengan pendarahan tidak normal) dan wanita yang haidnya tidak teratur — haid sekali sebulan atau dua kali sebulan: 'Masa iddahnya adalah tiga bulan.'

252.iwh_en: It was reported from Hammad that he said: 'She counts her waiting period ('iddah) by the quru' (menstrual cycles or periods of purity).'
252.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Hammad bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia menghitung masa iddahnya berdasarkan quru' (siklus haid atau masa suci).'

253.iwh_en: It was reported from Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib that he said: 'The waiting period ('iddah) of the mustahadah is one year.'
253.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib bahwa ia berkata: 'Masa iddah mustahadah adalah satu tahun.'

254.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan that he said: 'The mustahadah counts her waiting period ('iddah) by the quru' (menstrual cycles or periods of purity).'
254.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia berkata: 'Mustahadah menghitung masa iddahnya berdasarkan quru'.'

255.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Zuhri that he said: 'By the quru'.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) said: The people of Hijaz say: 'Al-aqra' means the periods of purity (athar),' while the people of Iraq say: 'It means menstruation.' Al-Darimi said: 'And my view is that it means menstruation.'
255.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Zuhri bahwa ia berkata: 'Berdasarkan quru'.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) berkata: Penduduk Hijaz berpendapat bahwa al-aqra' bermakna masa suci, sedangkan penduduk Iraq berpendapat maknanya adalah haid. Al-Darimi berkata: 'Dan pendapatku adalah bahwa maknanya adalah haid.'

256.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan that he said: 'The mustahadah counts her waiting period ('iddah) by the quru' (menstrual cycles or periods of purity).'
256.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia berkata: 'Mustahadah menghitung masa iddahnya berdasarkan quru'.'

257.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Awza'i that he said: I asked al-Zuhri about a man who divorced his wife while she was young and menstruating, then her menstruation stopped when he divorced her and she saw no blood — how long is her waiting period? He said: 'Three months.' He was also asked about a woman who menstruates once then her menstruation is delayed, remaining for seven or eight months before menstruating again irregularly — how does she count her 'iddah? He said: 'If her menstruation differs from her normal quru', her 'iddah is one year.' Al-Awza'i said: If she menstruated with known quru', then she counts by her quru'.
257.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Awza'i bahwa ia berkata: Aku bertanya kepada al-Zuhri tentang seorang pria yang menceraikan istrinya saat ia masih muda dan sedang haid, lalu haidnya berhenti ketika ia dicerai dan ia tidak melihat darah — berapa lama iddahnya? Ia berkata: 'Tiga bulan.' Ia juga ditanya tentang wanita yang haid sekali lalu haidnya terlambat, tinggal tujuh atau delapan bulan sebelum haid lagi secara tidak teratur — bagaimana ia menghitung iddahnya? Ia berkata: 'Jika haidnya berbeda dari quru' biasanya, iddahnya satu tahun.' Al-Awza'i berkata: Jika ia haid dengan quru' yang diketahui, maka ia menghitung berdasarkan quru'nya.'

258.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Awza'i that he was asked about a man who purchases a slave girl who has not yet reached menstruation and cannot be pregnant — how long is her istibra' (waiting period to confirm absence of pregnancy)? He said: 'Three months.' Yahya ibn Abi Kathir said: 'Forty-five days.'
258.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Awza'i bahwa ia ditanya tentang seorang pria yang membeli seorang budak perempuan yang belum mencapai usia haid dan tidak mungkin hamil — berapa lama istibra'nya? Ia berkata: 'Tiga bulan.' Yahya ibn Abi Kathir berkata: 'Empat puluh lima hari.'

259.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he used to say regarding the mustahadah: 'She performs ghusl (ritual bath) before every prayer and prays.' And Hammad said: 'If a mustahadah neglects her prayers for months, she must make them up.' When he was asked how she makes them up, he said: 'She makes them up in one day if she is able.' When al-Darimi was asked whether he held this view, he said: 'Yes, by Allah.'
259.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia biasa berkata mengenai mustahadah: 'Ia mandi (mandi junub) sebelum setiap shalat dan melaksanakan shalat.' Hammad berkata: 'Jika seorang mustahadah meninggalkan shalatnya selama berbulan-bulan, ia harus mengqadha shalat-shalat tersebut.' Ketika ditanya bagaimana ia mengqadhanya, ia berkata: 'Ia mengqadhanya dalam satu hari jika mampu.' Ketika al-Darimi ditanya apakah ia berpendapat demikian, ia berkata: 'Ya, demi Allah.'

260.iwh_en: It was reported from Malik ibn Anas that he said: I asked al-Zuhri about a pregnant woman who sees blood, and he said: 'She leaves off the prayer.'
260.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Malik ibn Anas bahwa ia berkata: Aku bertanya kepada al-Zuhri tentang wanita hamil yang melihat darah, dan ia berkata: 'Ia meninggalkan shalat.'

261.iwh_en: It was reported from Mujahid that he was asked about a pregnant woman who sees blood. He said: 'That is the diminishing of the wombs. [As Allah says:] "Allah knows what every female bears, and what the wombs diminish and what they exceed" (Surah al-Ra'd: 8). Whatever diminishes of something, she sees its like during pregnancy.'
261.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Mujahid bahwa ia ditanya tentang wanita hamil yang melihat darah. Ia berkata: 'Itu adalah berkurangnya rahim. [Sebagaimana Allah berfirman:] "Allah mengetahui apa yang dikandung setiap perempuan, dan apa yang berkurang dalam rahim dan apa yang bertambah" (QS. al-Ra'd: 8). Apa pun yang berkurang, ia melihat sejenisnya selama kehamilan.'

262.iwh_en: It was reported from Ikrimah regarding the verse: 'And what the wombs diminish and what they exceed' (Surah al-Ra'd: 8) that he said: 'That is menstruation during pregnancy. For every day she menstruates during pregnancy, it adds a day of purity to her pregnancy [to complete the full term].'
262.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ikrimah mengenai ayat: 'Dan apa yang berkurang dalam rahim dan apa yang bertambah' (QS. al-Ra'd: 8) bahwa ia berkata: 'Itu adalah haid selama kehamilan. Setiap hari ia haid selama kehamilan, ditambahkan satu hari masa suci pada kehamilannya [untuk menyempurnakan masa penuh].'

263.iwh_en: It was reported from Yahya ibn Sa'id that he said: 'It is a matter not disputed among us' — narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) — 'that a pregnant woman, when she sees blood, does not pray until she becomes pure.'
263.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Yahya ibn Sa'id bahwa ia berkata: 'Ini adalah perkara yang tidak diperselisihkan di antara kami' — diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) — 'bahwa wanita hamil, apabila ia melihat darah, tidak melakukan shalat hingga ia suci.'

264.iwh_en: It was reported from Ikrimah regarding the verse: 'And what they exceed' (Surah al-Ra'd: 8), that he said: 'For every day she menstruated during her pregnancy, she gains a day added to her period of purity until she completes nine months in a state of purity.'
264.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ikrimah mengenai ayat: 'Dan apa yang bertambah' (QS. al-Ra'd: 8), bahwa ia berkata: 'Setiap hari ia haid selama kehamilannya, ia mendapat satu hari tambahan pada masa sucinya hingga ia menyempurnakan sembilan bulan dalam keadaan suci.'

265.iwh_en: It was reported from Mujahid regarding the verse: 'And what the wombs diminish' (Surah al-Ra'd: 8) that he said: 'When a woman menstruates while pregnant, that is a deficiency in the child; and when she exceeds nine months, that is a completion of what was lacking in her child.'
265.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Mujahid mengenai ayat: 'Dan apa yang berkurang dalam rahim' (QS. al-Ra'd: 8) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika seorang wanita haid saat hamil, itu adalah kekurangan pada anaknya; dan ketika ia melebihi sembilan bulan, itu adalah pelengkap kekurangan pada anaknya.'

266.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Muzani that he said: 'My wife menstruates while she is pregnant.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) said: I heard Sulayman ibn Harb say: 'My wife menstruates while she is pregnant.'
266.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Muzani bahwa ia berkata: 'Istriku haid sementara ia sedang hamil.' Abu Muhammad (al-Darimi) berkata: Aku mendengar Sulayman ibn Harb berkata: 'Istriku haid sementara ia sedang hamil.'

267.iwh_en: It was reported from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When a pregnant woman sees blood, she should refrain from prayer, for it is menstruation.' And it was reported from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) by way of Malik through another chain with the same meaning.
267.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Apabila wanita hamil melihat darah, hendaklah ia menahan diri dari shalat, karena itu adalah haid.' Dan dilaporkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui Malik dengan sanad lain yang bermakna sama.'

268.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Sha'bi regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood: 'If the blood is fresh (bright red), she performs ghusl and prays; if it is a yellowish discharge (tariyyah), she performs wudu and prays.' Al-Awza'i reported the same.
268.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Sha'bi mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah: 'Jika darahnya segar (merah terang), ia mandi dan shalat; jika itu adalah cairan kekuningan (tariyyah), ia berwudu dan shalat.' Al-Awza'i melaporkan hal yang sama.'

269.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan that he said regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood: 'If she sees it as she used to see it before during her normal menstrual cycles, she leaves off the prayer; but if it is only for a day or two, she does not leave off the prayer.'
269.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia berkata mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah: 'Jika ia melihatnya sebagaimana biasa ia melihatnya sebelumnya pada siklus haid normalnya, ia meninggalkan shalat; tetapi jika hanya sehari atau dua hari, ia tidak meninggalkan shalat.'

270.iwh_en: It was reported from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood, that she said: 'That does not prevent her from prayer.'
270.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah, bahwa ia berkata: 'Itu tidak menghalanginya dari shalat.'

271.iwh_en: It was reported from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood, that she said: 'She performs ghusl and prays.' Yazid (ibn Harun) said: 'She does not perform ghusl.' Al-Darimi said: 'My view is that of Yazid.'
271.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah, bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia mandi dan shalat.' Yazid (ibn Harun) berkata: 'Ia tidak perlu mandi.' Al-Darimi berkata: 'Pendapatku adalah pendapat Yazid.'

272.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood that he said: 'She is in the same situation as the mustahadah, except that she does not leave off the prayer.'
272.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia berada dalam situasi yang sama seperti mustahadah, kecuali ia tidak meninggalkan shalat.'

273.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood that he said: 'She washes the blood off herself, performs wudu, and prays.'
273.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia membasuh darah dari dirinya, berwudu, dan shalat.'

274.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' and al-Hakam that they both said: 'When a pregnant woman sees blood, she performs wudu and prays.'
274.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' dan al-Hakam bahwa keduanya berkata: 'Apabila wanita hamil melihat darah, ia berwudu dan shalat.'

275.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood that he said: 'She performs wudu and prays.'
275.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia berwudu dan shalat.'

276.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan that he said: 'She is in the same situation as the mustahadah.'
276.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia berada dalam situasi yang sama seperti mustahadah.'

277.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) that he said: 'There is no menstruation during pregnancy.'
277.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada haid selama kehamilan.'

278.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood that he said: 'She is in the same situation as the mustahadah.'
278.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia berada dalam situasi yang sama seperti mustahadah.'

279.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) that he said: 'When a pregnant woman sees blood, she does not leave off the prayer.'
279.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) bahwa ia berkata: 'Apabila wanita hamil melihat darah, ia tidak meninggalkan shalat.'

280.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' and al-Hakam ibn Utaybah that they both said regarding a pregnant woman and a woman who has ceased menstruating who sees blood: 'They both perform wudu and pray, but do not perform ghusl.'
280.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' dan al-Hakam ibn Utaybah bahwa keduanya berkata mengenai wanita hamil dan wanita yang telah berhenti haid yang melihat darah: 'Keduanya berwudu dan shalat, tetapi tidak mandi junub.'

281.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' that he said: 'They both perform ghusl and pray.'
281.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' bahwa ia berkata: 'Keduanya mandi junub dan shalat.'

282.iwh_en: It was reported from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A pregnant woman does not menstruate; so when she sees blood, she should perform ghusl and pray.'
282.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wanita hamil tidak haid; maka apabila ia melihat darah, hendaklah ia mandi junub dan shalat.'

283.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) regarding a woman who sees blood while in labor that he said: 'It is menstruation — she leaves off the prayer.'
283.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) mengenai wanita yang melihat darah saat dalam kondisi melahirkan bahwa ia berkata: 'Itu adalah haid — ia meninggalkan shalat.'

284.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan regarding a pregnant woman in labor: 'When labor pains strike her and she sees blood on the child, she should refrain from prayer.' Al-Darimi said: 'She prays as long as she has not yet given birth.'
284.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan mengenai wanita hamil yang sedang bersalin: 'Apabila rasa sakit melahirkan menimpanya dan ia melihat darah pada anaknya, hendaklah ia menahan diri dari shalat.' Al-Darimi berkata: 'Ia shalat selama belum melahirkan.'

285.iwh_en: It was reported from Qatadah regarding a woman in post-natal bleeding (nifas): 'Like the purity period of a woman among her fellow women.'
285.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Qatadah mengenai wanita dalam masa nifas: 'Seperti masa suci seorang wanita di antara sesama wanita.'

286.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan regarding a woman in post-natal bleeding (nifas): 'She refrains from prayer for forty days; if she becomes pure (before that), then so be it. If she does not become pure, she refrains for another five or six days. If she becomes pure, then so be it; otherwise she refrains until fifty days. If she becomes pure, so be it; otherwise she is like the mustahadah.'
286.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan mengenai wanita dalam masa nifas: 'Ia menahan diri dari shalat selama empat puluh hari; jika ia suci (sebelum itu), maka itulah. Jika tidak suci, ia menahan diri selama lima atau enam hari lagi. Jika suci, maka itulah; jika tidak, ia menahan diri hingga lima puluh hari. Jika suci, itulah; jika tidak, ia seperti mustahadah.'

287.iwh_en: It was reported from Uthman ibn Abi al-As that he: 'did not approach (his wife in) post-natal bleeding (nifas) for forty days.' And al-Hasan said: 'The nifas period is forty-five to fifty days; whatever exceeds that, she is like the mustahadah.'
287.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Utsman ibn Abi al-As bahwa ia: 'tidak mendekati (istrinya yang dalam) nifas selama empat puluh hari.' Dan al-Hasan berkata: 'Masa nifas adalah empat puluh lima hingga lima puluh hari; apa pun yang melebihi itu, ia seperti mustahadah.'

288.iwh_en: It was reported from Uthman ibn Abi al-As that he said: 'The duration of nifas (post-natal bleeding) is forty days; if she becomes pure [before that], so be it; otherwise she should not exceed it before resuming prayer.'
288.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Utsman ibn Abi al-As bahwa ia berkata: 'Durasi nifas adalah empat puluh hari; jika ia suci (sebelumnya), maka itulah; jika tidak, hendaklah ia tidak melewatinya sebelum kembali shalat.'

289.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' that he said: 'If a woman in nifas (post-natal bleeding) has an established custom, she follows it; otherwise she remains for forty nights.'
289.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' bahwa ia berkata: 'Jika wanita nifas memiliki kebiasaan yang telah ditetapkan, ia mengikutinya; jika tidak, ia tetap dalam keadaan itu selama empat puluh malam.'

290.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' that he said: 'Post-natal bleeding (nifas) is like menstruation.'
290.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' bahwa ia berkata: 'Nifas (pendarahan pasca melahirkan) seperti haid.'

291.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'A woman in post-natal bleeding (nifas) waits approximately forty days.'
291.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wanita dalam nifas menunggu sekitar empat puluh hari.'

292.iwh_en: It was reported from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Women in post-natal bleeding (nifas) in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to sit for forty days — or forty nights — and one of us would apply wars (a yellow dye plant) on her face on account of the chloasma (skin discoloration).'
292.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ummu Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wanita-wanita dalam nifas pada zaman Rasulullah ﷺ biasa duduk (tidak shalat) selama empat puluh hari — atau empat puluh malam — dan salah seorang di antara kami mengoleskan wars (tanaman pewarna kuning) pada wajahnya karena kloasma (perubahan warna kulit).'

293.iwh_en: It was reported from Mu'awiyah ibn Qurrah that a wife of A'idh ibn Amr experienced post-natal bleeding and came after twenty nights had passed and entered (the husband's) bed. He said: 'Who is this?' She said: 'I am so-and-so; I have become pure.' He pushed her away with his foot and said: 'Do not deceive me regarding my religion until forty nights have passed.'
293.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Mu'awiyah ibn Qurrah bahwa istri A'idh ibn Amr mengalami nifas lalu datang setelah dua puluh malam berlalu dan masuk ke (tempat tidur) suaminya. Ia berkata: 'Siapa ini?' Ia berkata: 'Aku si fulanah; aku telah suci.' Ia mendorongnya dengan kakinya dan berkata: 'Jangan tipu aku dalam agamaku hingga empat puluh malam berlalu.'

294.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'A woman in post-natal bleeding (nifas) sits for approximately forty days.'
294.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wanita dalam nifas duduk (menahan dari shalat) sekitar empat puluh hari.'

295.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that he said: 'A woman in post-natal bleeding (nifas) waits approximately forty days.'
295.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibnu Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wanita dalam nifas menunggu sekitar empat puluh hari.'

296.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan that he said regarding a woman in post-natal bleeding (nifas) who sees blood: 'She waits forty nights, then prays.' And al-Sha'bi said: 'Two months — then she is like the mustahadah.'
296.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia berkata mengenai wanita nifas yang melihat darah: 'Ia menunggu empat puluh malam, lalu shalat.' Dan al-Sha'bi berkata: 'Dua bulan — kemudian ia seperti mustahadah.'

297.iwh_en: It was reported from Makhul that he said: 'A woman (in nifas) waits thirty days if she delivers a boy, and forty days if she delivers a girl' — meaning the woman in post-natal bleeding. Marwan said: 'That is the view of Sa'id ibn Abd al-Aziz.' And al-Awza'i said: 'They are the same.'
297.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Makhul bahwa ia berkata: 'Wanita (dalam nifas) menunggu tiga puluh hari jika melahirkan anak laki-laki, dan empat puluh hari jika melahirkan anak perempuan' — maksudnya wanita dalam nifas. Marwan berkata: 'Itulah pendapat Sa'id ibn Abd al-Aziz.' Dan al-Awza'i berkata: 'Keduanya sama.'

298.iwh_en: It was reported from al-Hasan that he said: 'If she sees blood at the onset of labor — a day or two — that is part of nifas (post-natal bleeding).'
298.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari al-Hasan bahwa ia berkata: 'Jika ia melihat darah pada awal proses persalinan — sehari atau dua hari — itu adalah bagian dari nifas.'

299.iwh_en: It was reported from Ata' regarding a pregnant woman who sees blood while in labor that he said: 'She does what a mustahadah does.'
299.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ata' mengenai wanita hamil yang melihat darah saat dalam proses persalinan bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia melakukan apa yang dilakukan mustahadah.'

300.iwh_en: It was reported from Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) regarding a woman in a state of major ritual impurity (janabah) who then begins to menstruate that he said: 'She performs ghusl (once, covering both).' And from al-Hasan similarly.
300.iwh_id: Dilaporkan dari Ibrahim (al-Nakha'i) mengenai wanita yang dalam keadaan junub kemudian mulai haid bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia mandi junub (sekali, mencakup keduanya).' Dan dari al-Hasan dengan makna yang sama.'
